text: I got this vertical mouse after my bluetooth one started dying on me. The mouse itself is a good concept and the "RBG" lights are cool though I don't believe they are truly full spectrum. The mouse is just too big for me, my hand can barely fit around it and the buttons are all very far apart from each other. I'm an average sized woman with pretty averaged sized hands and i feel someone larger would be more suited for this mouse. I will be returning, unfortunately.
It's a 3rd party controller, so I don't expect it to be problem free. My offspring likes these because they light up. My issue is that they don't seem to last that long.

Great graphics, character dialogue and music. The reason for the 3 stars is because the fights didn't feel any different from the previous titles. Maybe I've just outgrown the series. Not bad for under $30 though.
Way to many I will never use all of them
This app is not set up to configure well with Kindle Fire, I love him on PBS, paid for the app but cannot get complete communication. Finally gave up on it and deleted.

For the first two weeks, the ring held it's position on it's own, but after that it loosened and kinda just flops around. I am still using it, and I would rather use it than not, but the functioning did change.
Never vot it working on my tablet then realized that my speakers were turned off. My tablet chrashed and this was lost.
Works perfect for my husband with no complaints, hooked right up to his laptop.
Bought two pairs Have left them on charger for two days still keeps dying after connecting to device

I bought this for my early Kindle Fire.
It works great. Great chess engine. Great interface, but. . .
I must give it only 3 stars because I can't find a way to transfer games to my desk top.
I've tried the following:
1. Used the cable link, but the games won't copy at all.
2. I'm trying to find a note pad that will allow pasting from the clipboard, and then allow me to save the notes as a doc in a folder.
Anyone out there have a solution, please post it here.
Thanks.

My wife was excited about this eye cream, as it was all natural… however, her excitement quickly faded when she realized that it doesn’t absorb into the skin like she wanted it to, and it goes on “chunky”. It isn’t creamy at all. Not sure if this was a bad batch or what, but she is not too crazy about this stuff at all.
This spray is a little too strong for my sensitive skins. It irritates my skin when I use it.
Caption is quite clean. The stand is too feeble though and is of little use.
TBS app. is good for three stars.
If you are a guy, this will, at best, fit on your forearm. It doesn't appear to fit anything more than 15" with the clasp closed. The clasp itself makes this bulky and heavier than expected.
Formula seems a.bit clumpy. I cleaned off wand but still a bit thick. Stays on well comes off fairly easy
Item returned wrong size

Very dumb due to bad programming. Can't answer most of my questions. Typical have to ask Google on my phone, which almost always knows. Most of the skills you can load are bad and a waste of time. Nice for music (although speaker not good. Later models supposed to be better.) and controlling linked devices.

I got a new Kindle to replace my 6 year old one that started to get lines in the display. There’s not an enormous difference, but the type is a bit crisper. The interface is still slow (which is fine). My big issue is the light is SO BRIGHT. Even at the lowest setting, it is many times brighter than the older kindle, which makes it unusable at night when I’m trying not to wake my partner. This can be fixed with a firmware update, so fingers crossed.
I expected this game to have action as if you were playing on the ps3 and instead it was just flying from one fairy to another, talking. The mini games were the only action. Lame.
Pairing is awkwardly and sound is unclear and sticky. Cumbersome design. Fits socket poorly. I’ll stick with my AirPods. They’re much better.

Didn't realize this doesn't work with Disney Infinity 2.0 or 3.0 until after purchasing. Went to EB games and bought 1.0 for 97 cents and now my daughter can play it. It would be helpful if the seller could put in bold letters somewhere "NOT COMPATIBLE WITH 2.0 or 3.0". Oh well, solved now.

I'm coming from using am otterbox so take that into account but there is little to no screen protection. The back is fine but the rounded screen actually is a little above the case so if it falls it won't be good. Sending back.

The lanyard is cute but I expected the clasp and ring part to be all metal and instead it is plastic or some kind of plastic-coated material. I don't know if can hold as much weight as I have on it over time. Otherwise, it's a cute lanyard and the washed out rosy tropical print is pretty. I had a thread wallet and chapstick holder before this. Hopefully this lanyard will last as long!
Can't really expect much for this price but still sub par

Living in Florida year round, it isn't always easy to get out and walk. We have
high humidity and/or thunderstorms, so this is a great way to make sure you
get your daily walk. Great variety of music as you walk. Interactive scenery.
It is fun and healthy.
Color is darker than pictured.
not best game, not worst game. Story a little weak & wish was 3 person pary, but was fun to see old favorites like slime!
It great the phone fall and still work wow
The catagories are vague most times. The words sometimes don't match the catagory I selected and I am dumbfounded when the word appears. Otherwise, it is okay

Not that I've ever spent time thinking about the quality of my barber capes, but this is actually the most comfortable cape I've ever owned. That's probably because I've only ever used the free ones that comes with the clippers you buy. This one feels so comfortable. The snap button collar might be an issue with smaller kids and smaller necks. I tried it on my 8 yr old and the tightest setting still left a gap because he's so skinny. LOL! Some layers of tissue paper should do the trick. Anyway, we like... 5-stars!

This game is awful...a waste of time and money. I thought it would be more like the bowling games at "sports restaurants" but it is not. Very cheesy...you can't put a spin or curve on the ball. Do not buy as it is like throwing good money away.
Nice, smooth pencil. 4 stars because they don’t sharpen easily.
I still get angry at the way printer manufacturers have us. Low cost printers, but the ink is so expensive. It's a rigged game.
GAME IS FUN BUT I SUCK!
Cost money, dont care for it
These things are barely able to write your phone number on so no room for name

Well they are NOT ps4 Compatible, the material is cheap and flimsy! What a waste of time and money. Came with wires that don’t actually go to the headset I suppose to make it look like they were meant to work with the ps4 but they are awful. Returned.

I love Mrs. Meyers soap because it is gentle and does not dry out my skin no matter how often I wash my hands! This is a lovely scent I enjoy. Many times, this triple pack is more cost effective than the refill, or equal if you can use some extra dispensers in other areas. There are several other nice scents I enjoy when they are affordable. I feel good about washing my Golden Retriever and Great Pyrenees dogs with this soap. It is gentle on their skin. Their fur coats look clean and beautiful.

my daughters have thick AA hair and I have a perm and I literally used this tub once on each of us and I have just enough left for maybe 1 or 2 more washes-depending on whose hair get's washed next :( smells really good but for the amount you get I'm sure I can find something else less expensive...
My hair is fine and these have no grip power. They just slide away....

I love rose scented products, but this product smells like very strong, artificial roses. The smell lingers, and I honestly felt very overwhelmed by the scent. I had to wash my face. If you have very sensitive skin like I do, this may not be the product for you. It is also more of a gel-like toner, so when it foes on, it leaves a bit of texture and stickiness behind. I personally did not like the feeling. The rose petals in the containers are beautiful. Aesthetically, it looks amazing, and would be the perfect piece to add to a shelfie, but as far as performance goes, it is not my favorite.

ChuChu TV quickly grabs a toddlers attention with its bright colors, and sign song character voices. However their improper use of grammar and mispronunciation of English words, along with randomly inappropriate content (oh look a crab, this is food for the otter, and other such uncomfortable and unexpected moments) make this a poor choice for your child.
Very nice but really sharp.
Nice but the USB did not work on my system. I returned it.

I purchased this to use in the gym with my iPod shuffle to avoid using wired earbuds. In the sense that it eliminated the wires, it was a success, but in terms of musical fidelity and blocking out extraneous sound, it was a failure. Back to my earbuds.

The cushions feel like they are decent quality, for headset cushions anyway. Another review mentioned that these would work for the Jabra Pro 920 headset. This is not the case - it doesn't fit, and therefore would not fit the 930 either. The only reason I am making this review is to articulate that point.
I was not comfortable with this case. Seems rather flimsy and it felt very uncomfortable. Took it off after an hour.
I am glad I found this item as a fan of the original Michael Kors scent this is right up there. The color, the packaging and the fresh clean scent is very likeable. Needless to say I am a fan.
extension arm is way too rigid. clamp needs to grip better.
this was not what I thought it would be playing I gave it to someone else I hope they get some enjoyment
Worked perfectly for a Steel Battalion controller I found online. Currently running it via PC USB thanks to some drivers you can find on Google, though you'll need to know C# to make them work.

These ink cartridges don’t leak and appear well made.
They don’t fit my pen.
The end is slightly smaller than what is required in my pen.
I’ve attached a photo with the AmazonBasics ink cartridge in the right.
If you have a smaller than standard setting in your pen then this ink cartridges should work.
the smell isn't really that nice compare to another kind of charcoal soap (the big rectangular one)

So it is a great picture and video quality, until it lasts... Only two days after delivery, while camera was in use (including underwater pictures in a swimming pool) the LCD screen started to turn while and developed a huge blemish, after which the camera became unusable. I'm not sure if its design is flawed and there was a leak, or something else broke, but its longevity is the major blow to the quality. "Made in China" label does not help either...
Was pretty poorly made. Seams and inside bits were maligned so didn’t fit well. Too bad because would have worked well.

A reasonably priced cable that I bought as a replacement for an Asus external USB monitor. The one thing I've noticed is flickering in the video vs. the original (Asus) cable. Going to try and get an Asus replacement cable to see if that resolves the flicker.

This cames in a lovely little round box, with a pink puff inside.
The powder has a soft texture to it.
I’m older and my skin is not dry, but this is too dry for me, and I look too pale, although I put my blush on after.
What I do like this for is, I do like to put this on My eyebrows before using the eyebrow pencil, as it keeps the pencil color from smudging off.

Glad to see this is cruelty free.

3 1/2 stars
So far its fun and easy, but I can tell the fun won't last long as its too easy and the challenge will be over fast. For the price is a good little game to get if you want get out to the real course.
School supplies. I would have liked it if they came pre-sharpened, lol. Exactly what the teacher ordered.
The led is super weak. Not for drawing. Maybe writing??

My wife and I love to kick back on the couch and play this together when we can. The two player mode is much better than some of the other Mario games we've played and we both enjoy it.

A great challenging game for the young and old.

I searched for fragrance free and so when this came up I assumed it would be. Wrong. It is extremely scented and since it’s for the face it’s overpowering. Plus I’m sensitive to perfumes. It’s going back.
False advertising on steroids. But it has its charms!

Its a nice game and I recommend it to anime lovers. But a few things were messed up in my opinion. 1st. They should have it where you can zoom out. 2nd. If you have the male body but a female shirt the shirt has..lumps still in the fabric... Overall it was a great game

Came as described. Very sturdy and hard plastic. Slightly heavy but much better than a sturdy clipboard with the big ol massive clip.

One has been broken so far. Use for rounds in a hospital every 15 mins. It snapped after being smashed between a metal door (1in thick) and metal frame. Would expect it to break

perfect simple desk calculator. the dark color makes the number keys easier to see, and there are more decimal places than usual, ten to twelve depending on the integer. i can't believe it's so inexpensive. don't hesitate.
Looks really nice but our's doesnt stay connected while you're playing and will shut itself off while youre playing.
I really like this handsoap already. It gives you a fresh, clean and non dry feel. I would recommend to anyway especially lavender fans! The item arrived super fast as well!

Very Happy with Camera
For Indoor Use
In Color
Can watch from iPad or computer

I had this camera and upgraded it to a newer model. I use the newer camera as a security camera for my front yard. I like the app and that I can watch whats going on using my iPad. The camera is near the wireless router.
I used to used the older and newer camera in my barn a half an acre away from the wireless router. It did have connection issues. It was disconnecting. It was still good considering it was a half an acre away from the router.

although i bought the wrong one for my phone i was able to
put it on my phone and realized it was not for me. obscured
the screen more then i liked even if it fit like a glove, i wouldn't
suggest this. the unique fact that it was mirror like was what
had intrigued me initially. but then it is a personal preference,
Have not used as of today.
The colors aren’t great, they aren’t mixed up well and look old like they’ve been sitting somewhere for ever. Not happy…
I have to hold the sides of the cover and manipulate it to use the touch screen.
This seemed to work OK. Have only used it once on a drive that was having issues before hand. Transferred material which is what it was suppose to do.
I think mcafee makes my computer work slowly.

Maybe it's because I have oily skin, but I've used this product like 4 times in the last month. I've never had any peeling. I've worked my time up from 1.5 minutes all the way to 4 minutes without any results. I've tried washing my face beforehand with either water or rubbing alcohol too, but no dice.
Short term effects are noticable. Dewey, glowy skin. Long term I've broken out a ton more. Hope I'll get good results in the next few times or in the trash it goes.
They seem to be as good as the ones I would get from stores or canon. No problems and they seem to last appropriately.
Headset worked fairly well when new but less than 6 months later it has major connectivity issues. It has basically stopped working. Will not purchase again.
Thin. Toothy in one side, smooth on other. Yellow. Not true smooth thick vellum. Too thin for cards. Too thick for letters. Holds toner better than card stock.

This lap pad would be great if the soft padded area on the bottom was on the top for your wrist to rest on. The part across the top for the wrist rest is very firm, and after I use it awhile my wrist starts burning. I wanted a lap pad with a comfortable wrist rest but this one is too hard!

It was good while it lasted. It was cute, comfortable, and quiet BUT now the left click doesn't work anymore and it's only been 6 months. I didn't abuse the mouse nor did I drop it. It just suddenly stopped working in the middle of my work. I have other computer mice that still work after years of daily use! Now I'm back on the market for another mouse. *shaking my head in disappointment*
worked flawlessly with my re-purposed kdl-4-v3000 sony (controls all of tv's features) s very good deal.
Does it's job just mad at Sony for how small and expensive these are I'd suggest one with a bigger GB storage around 64 gb should be fine trust me .
Fun and engaging game.

Score some points and get this for your
Wife !
Very pretty and easy on the wrists. Thank you!
Works better than the $60 cables.

Trying out different waterproof pens. I don't actually like the feel of microns so looking for a replacement. These are ok but not great. Two of the pens have good flow with nice lines (and just fine for lefties). One of the set is not smooth and seems uneven and scratchy. The tip doesn't look perfect so that may be the issue. For $12 I don't think it's a great deal either. So this isn't "the" pen. On the plus side no smearing and ink dried right away. Very dark ink too.

Phenomenal games in a very affordable and worthwhile package.
If I were to gripe about anything it's that the collectors edition package feels a bit on the cheap side.
The case holding the games isn't the most well crafted thing and i can feel both the case and the flimsy box holding it together deteriorating just a little bit at a time everytime I pull it off the shelf and take the game out.
So in a years time i feel it will look extremely battle damaged
The phone case discolored in less than a month from regular use and I will now have to pick something else.
Works for what I'm using it for, makeup. It's sometimes hard to pull the drawers out and back in, but for the price I'll deal with it.
Sucked neither worked started clicking and would not cycle..other one had high pitch sequeal when hooked up.
cannot get it to work...and the help line never answers and if you get someone to take a message...NO ONE calls you back...DONOT care for Winegard
Hard to put on & harder to take off when it got my iPhone so hot the battery drained rapidly. Looks cute but not a good case.
Great product recommended

The case seems durable.
The screen protector is of cheap quality and might come off after some use.
Great value for money.
I didn't realize that the camera protector has a black boarder since my phone is in green color, be aware of that.
Works, but the scent wasn’t really for me- it is mild and you don’t notice it once it is applied. I tried it as an alternative to spray deodorant. Solid bar and it does work nicely for my long runs.

The case is as presented in the photo. It looks really nice. However, it is flimsy and wouldn't be much protection if you dropped your iPad (or whatever) In addition, it has a really bad smell -- like petrochemicals. Can I air it out? Maybe. But why would I want that smell dissipating throughout my house? (Answer: I don't.)

The Tri-wing screwdriver fit the DS perfectly, however the phillips that came with this set did not. Fortunately I own plenty of small screwdrivers and was able to do the phillips myself. I would imagine that most people would have one that would fit anyway, and if they didnt include the wrong size one and sold just the Tri-Wing at the same price it'd be a five, but throwing in a bonus that is useless brings down the value.

Through everything goes in it,
It is bulky. I would go for something else (in the words of my son whom I bought it for)
the watch is not working at all

My grandson dislikes the headset because the other gamers can’t hear him. He’s always speaking loudly into the mic for them to hear him and he just gives up. He has to hold the cord a certain way and the. They can hear him speak, but then he’s not able to use his other hand to use the controller to play.

This item has a lifetime warranty if you fill out the card, the USB port broke on my device and Alpatronix customer service denied my claim. Don’t waste your time like I did by filling out the warranty and contacting the customer service

I am pretty active with sports and I try not to shampoo every time to protect my hair from excess stripping of its natural oil. I was surprised how naturally moisturizing this shampoo was without additional conditioner. It does not add heaviness, and yet it gives me the clean I am looking after a long run and after a veery sweaty workout. The scent is okay, but I welcome that I can wash my hair with a shampoo that helps in 'soothing' my hair and not strip it dry. recommend if you need to wash your hair daily and dont want to condition it eery time.
This lightweight salon cape protects my skin from dyes and the snap closures stay firmly in place. I only wish it had a tighter adjustment for small neck widths.
Food not stick to My phone correctly causing my phone to fall cracking my screen protector
Been using it for a month now and barely got any bit of color. To be honest I'm pretty sure it's a fake the lotion is so watery.

Writes well , perfect fit for Sarasa, which is more comfortable than my standby the Zebra F-301 I've used for years (and will still use). Does smear if smudged within a few seconds and depending on surface but in general works really good. Wish the ink lasted as long as the F-301's.

Update- I'm averaging a refill every 3 weeks in my four pens in use at work.

Work best with Apple products. ANC is improved. Adaptive transparency is interesting. The friction fit only design still falls out way too easily. The Pro2 case is easier to find; however, the whole location thing is a bit wonky. Still fundamentally flawed due to lack of graphic equalizer adjustments. Are they worth the cost to upgrade? No. Are they worth the cost compared to Bose or Sony buds. Objectively, no.
I love this thing. I haven't used it yet, but I love looking at it on my desk. It's part of a project pile that will happily be done soon.

This game is fun and I haven't seen a guessing game done this way before. It's nice because you are working on two pictures at a time so if you are stuck on one you still have the other to work through. You've got letters to help you figure out the words and overall the game design and play is nice.

I ordered this battery pack through Amazon as a "stocking stuffer" for my brother in another state. It was shipped from HottestDealsEver corporation. When the product arrived, it was in an opened package, which had been taped shut with packing tape. Given that the product I ordered was supposed to be new and there was no mention of open-box items, I cannot give a good rating. That is not good service. My brother also said that the product itself seemed cheaply made and looked like a used return from another unhappy customer. I hope that others have had better service.
I am not a big sports fan, I will have to see if I am going to use it. Got it for friends who may be interested when they are visiting.

I have oily eyelids and thought this might help with that problem as that is what it claims. I my opinion, it is just OK at what it is supposed to do. But that is just my experience. Those with less oily skin and eyelids might have better results.

Ive been buying this for my grandmother who is 84 and her hair has been thinning. I must say im pretty suprised how thick her hair has become after 3 months of use. We still apply it to keep it from getting thin and can honestly say this product helps

Broke me out worse than I've ever broken out. I would not recommend to anyone. I normally love Burt's Bee's but I have not found an of their facial cleansing products other than the wipes that didn't break me out. I've used several different washes including this one and the moisturizers and all have broken me out. The wipes have been the only thing that hasn't of their products which I would recommend those.
I expected a bigger pack but they work ok. I wouldn't pay more than a dollar for the pack because it's small.

I like to spray this on my face off and on during the day. It moisturizers my face and it also refreshes my face. I am pleased with this product. Many days, I don't wear any makeup so a little squirt of the mist is refreshing

I have a size large hand, not huge by any means, and this mouse for some reason was just so short feeling, my fingers felt like they were hanging off the end, and curling under the somewhat sharp edges of the L/R mouse buttons. Also, the buttons, although good, were just too small for my thumb. Overall, it is well made, can be both wireless, AND wired, which I did not know at first...I really wanted to keep this mouse, but oh well.

I settled for a Razor DeathAdder instead, which despite not having as many extra buttons, etc., fits in my hand like it was made for me.
Thank you for this cute free app, my grand daughter and I like to play and it makes use our imagination our thinking caps!!!
i used this in homeschooling my sons. a helpful tool for the required classes to graduate high school.
Hey, it's Windows; what's not to love? Bwah ha ha!
Cord seems to come unplugged CONSTANTLY! Ugh.
The case was damaged and the disk keeps freezing.

A worthy replacement to my Naga epic! It's smaller than the newer version of the nagas (thank goodness), as I am very particular about my grip style.

Anyway, software is better than the stupid synapse crap Razer wants you to use. It's worlds ahead of its competition in this regard. Additionally, this thing is actually a pleasure to use and better than the MMO 7 and the original RAT (I have both). It's lighter, better laser feel, and more options that matter to your normal gamer.
Poor quality. Feels plasticy and cheap. It breaks leads like crazy.
I returned it bc the water still got into the case. If you buy make sure you test it without your phone first. It didn't work for me.

Initially it looked good, but then a big bubble appeared at the top of the screen and I couldn't get it our, I will replace it but I hope it doesn't happen again, otherwise it will defeat the purpose of why I even got it.

I recommend being careful, must be a hit or miss quality

the majority of the stickers did not have the glue on it so the buttons will stick to your switch. plus, if you want to change your case, they'll pop off or the case won't fit over them. truthfully, this is a waste of money. if you're brave, just buy some that you have to remove all the screws from your joy cons and replace them....but i'm not brave, nor do i have the patience! OR pay someone tech savvy to do it
Purchasing helps but not as much as a strong alliance. If you have a good alliance you are good.

This brand is overhyped. I don’t see any good result from using it and I don’t see it will work for any types of hair at all. The scent isn’t very pleasant. I got the 32oz one and it will last a very long time!
This calculator works great. It's easy to see and use, however, the free version has these annoying ads that show up across a banner while you are using it. annoying.
Not a game I would get again but too all that likes it have fun
As expected, will be posting photos soon.
This is an app. It works.
It was easy to put on my husbands phone

This calculator was used. I purchased it for a statistics class. The instructor spent much time helping me . We figured out the buttons were worn out so when values were entered they didn't always appear. No matter how hard I pushed the button. Glad it wasn't me though cause I was feeling pretty stupid half way through the semester. I'm throwing it in trash cause I can't do that to someone else. Spend money on one u can return if not made well. The frustrations that I I had dealing with this on a daily basis for 8 weeks was not worth what I thought I was savings.
Works Fine. It is a ruler
I used it to back up 3 windows 10 computers. The installation is simple and does not take very much time.

I got this for my 6 year old for her pencils. The case is durable, slim (travel friendly), and has several slots to organize. She is enjoying keeping her things in it and she loves the color. This would work great for colored pencils, markers, pens, or anything similar.
I like the big spaces for writing. But the book doesn’t have enough pages. I could only fit half of my passwords and contacts.
Broke after 1 hour of use.
year and a half,,,they dont hold a charge anymore..possibly due to 3 and 5 yr olds being the care providers for the wii
I have followed the instructions, but I can't get this to work. My computer doesn't recognize it, and can't load the driver, so I can't use it. Disappointing.
This brush is very well-made and durable. It's comfortable to hold and use. The curvature and vents make it ideal for use during blow-drying.

The colors are vibrant with lots of shimmer. Haven't run into any clogging issues while coloring. Almost every single scent is strong and unique to it's advertised scent. It's very difficult to find 'scented' coloring supplies that actually deliver and these definitely do. I accidently ordered 2 sets when ordering for a birthday gift and wasn't sorry at all that I got to keep one for myself.
Sadly the dates on the calendar are really hard. to read because they are such lightly printed! Otherwise it’s great with lots of space to write ✍🏻 in
Nice sturdy case. Makes the phone look way too big though. I chose the Spiegen neo hybrid instead.

I love the look of this product, but it only lasted two months under daily use on my MacBook Pro. I used the cover and keyboard cover. The keyboard cover immediately showed signs of wear as the ink started to rub off some of the keys. Then the cover started to chip away at the top center and middle bottom. The remaining shards of plastic are a hazard since it has cut my husband and I. The product is cheap and, although the design is cute, it was not worth it since I will have to replace it almost immediately after I bought it. Really Disappointed.
You'll love this if you're new to MMO's or really into Elder Scrolls. Otherwise, there are other MMO's out there that are a bit more fleshed out and better supported.
So the set we got has the same cubes and two of the same rectangles…..which leaves us without a 3 or 4, and without September through December!!
The app works okay but I only really downloaded it so I could set up an account to work with my Amazon Echo.
Updates are annoying because screen will just be black, so it's not clear it won't turn pn because it's updating. Very lightweight thpugh
makes your lips soft and help to heal chapped lips
Very relaxing after a day of work. Recommend for sure☺
Great value, using to blend with oils
Some of the sets make you stop and think, most are obvious. There are 150 sets in this game. I went through them pretty quick...twice.
Did not fit our controller. Took long to receive in mail.. not worth sending back. Just disappointed there are no universal pieces for controllers.
They sound so clear but they feel like nails in my ear canal. Holy heck. They are absolutely the worst shaped ear buds I have ever had. My ears are literally sore after 5 minutes of wearing them.

It has to be strategically placed. Otherwise your phone and stand tips over. This is very annoying. I bought another stand before this and it works amazingly. I wanted another stand this is why I bought this. I wish I bought the other one instead

I bought this last minute for a vacation I took. Overall, it worked well. The issue that I had with this is the same with all these GPS systems is the challenge is its not easy to adjust certain parts of your route. So if I want to avoid a specific road or area it's hard to do that ahead of time and plan it in the system. It just doesn't seem to sync as well as I would like. Otherwise this was a great.purchase. really like the Garmin brand overall

These lashes are supposed to be natural looking. They are too long and bold to look like what I consider natural. They are more appropriate for clubbing or stage performances. They do go on easily and stay in place well.
wish they had a handle and i get the feeling that the elastic latch will break sooner than later

These pens are nice, as you can refill them with fountain pen ink. But they don't come very full....
If you want to refill them take off the rollerball tip and refill using a fine point needle.
Easy to play, great game! Would recommend to anyone who loves puzzle games! Has different levels and games to keep you entertained for hours
It's a little strange, but it's cheap
It fits my husbands head! Also it doesn't break as easily as the turtle beach headsets.

Very useful little tool. I love the app. You can do video, images, PDFs....almost like a cam holder for youtuber (which I don't have and am not familiar with), and works for recording documents. This is a very cute clutch and I will be keeping it. I’m disappointed that there is no cushioning to protect the switch if I were to use it without a case. It should just be sold a clutch. There’s so much space and nothing protects the actual switch lite.

I like it even though it is a little hard for me to twist it so that it adjust to desk or headboard. But the most interesting thing I found is that I not only use it at a desk with the clamp but I can comfortably wrap it around my knee/leg when I am not near a desk and use it. I have very sensitive finger tips due to health problems and this makes is so convenient.

Candy crush is supper fun never boring love it. It has very good graphics love the colors and movements of the fruit.

(I ordered through my husband’s account so ignore the name)
Eh. Basic. I mean what do you expect for this price? I paid extra to get the beauty blender, and it’s terrible. It doesn’t blend. It just smears. Tonight when cleaning it I noticed a DRASTIC difference compared to my other beauty blender. Pictures are attached. It just dimpled, and shrunk. If wouldn’t get clean, and got very diformed. The brushes are okay.. The same as others posted the smell was super chemical like, and strong, and bristles fell out.
You pay for what you get.

I gave this as a Christmas gift. I was asked to see if there was something wrong with it because the sound was awful. Every channel on the FM dial produced nothing but static. Occasionally we could hear the music but within a couple of minutes the static would return. Spent over an hour trying to find a station that would work. Would not buy again, and will be returning it.

I own a Griffin 9501-TRIPCB iTrip Auto FM Transmitter and Auto Charger for iPod and it works great. I will be buying this to replace my gift for friend.
It’s small I like my 8 inch so much better the speaker so much louder on my 8 compared to this one.
Fun game for killing some time. It's easy and has good graphics with decent speed.give it a try.

I order this to do what we all do to protect our investment. It looks and feels great. It was packaged well and posed no significant issues with installation. I went with a middle of the road rating. For the money paid, it is a good cover.

Sleek simple design that’s easy to put on and take off. After months of use there are still no signs of wear or damage. Everything still perfectly functional and looking sharp. Would buy again

This kitty paw pencil case is cute! Pens and pencils fit nicely in it. I was able to get at least 10 pens in it without affecting the zipper. The zipper works well. There's a clip on it so you can attach it to your backpack.

Very pretty, just like in the pictures - - Doesn't fit the advertised phone though. My phone is the same specs and everything is VERY close, but the buttons don't totally line up which makes them hard to press and the case looks a bit tight.

Had to stick with the one the manufacturer gave me instead.

Glad I didn't buy it. you have to keep trying to get in a room to play. then the people in it are not even playing just texting. your waiting to finally play and they ban you from the room for no reason.

I purchased this first, but then later on bought the small black 5W USB charger that claims to charge the Kindle Paperwhite in less than 5 hours. It does seem to work faster than this one, but I'll keep the white one as a backup.

This is a nice stylish case for the iPhone 11. But on the one that I received, the thin area around the Lightning port at the bottom is very soft and flexible/ loose. I'm not sure if the case that I received is just defective or whether they're all like this but I can see this part stretching out over time with use.
Works great, we love it for lists on our fridge.
Purchased conditioner and inside the bottle of conditioner was shampoo,not conditioner. NEVER AGAIN. This product is too expensive to play these games. And cause damage to hair.

Had to apply two. Difficult and time consuming to keep flattening the edges down on the face of Fitbit Inpire 2. I am afraid it will peel off on the edges in short order. Never did find the video that showed application to the Inspire and mine did not include any written instructions. The video that Rinogear linked to showed how to apply to flat Fitbit Charge?? Not the same at all since Charge has totally flat screen. I don't think it will stay on long and although they give you 6, don't think I will go through the hassle of applying another. Too bad, wanted to like this thing.
This is okay but for me it didn’t focus very well.

Thin sound for JBL. Treble is dominant- little mid and very little bass. From JBL, I expect much fuller sound. It's an odd little speaker. Because if it's shake some kart is always pointing at the surface on which it is sitting. It's heavy, but solid. Connects without any trouble - Just turn both devices on - no having to switch off and on to find each other. Doesn't drop off. Cable is solid. If Harmon/JBL has a bass device that connects/pairs I may pick it up. This jack if full sound grates on me.
Sorry I purchased this. After one week, experienced problems playing CDs.

I use this brand all the time and love the sunscreen. I never burn. However I would it buy from this seller. I purchased a two-pack back on June 26th. It shipped within four days but I still haven’t received it and there is no tracking.
I had to open a claim and ask for a refund. This is a scam seller. Don’t waste your time.

I was a little disappointed with Super Monkey Ball. It has a main game, and 50 mini-games. The main game is quite fast paced and fun, however, it is a little too simplistic to justify the cost of a full game. Supposedly the 50 mini-games should make up for it. However, these mini-games are so difficult to control to be any fun. After playing Wii Sports, I just cannot get used to the awkward gaming experience Super Monkey Ball has to offer.
Works well, had some sharpie on it when it came though

I was happy with the moisturizer. It did a good job of stopping my skin from getting dry.

It went on well. It felt fine on. I didn’t have any reactions or problems or anything.

It stayed on fairly well. It didn’t feel too heavy or anything.

As a rule, I wear sunscreen daily since I'm outside with dogs and horses year round. Thus seems to be working, but I sweat a lot most days, so I'm reapplying often. This doesn't leave a greasy residue behind, but it takes longer to fully absorb than other brands. I really don't like the chemical sweet scent of this - fortunately it fades fast.
Don’t know how is the quality, because the printer die after the toner install with software update. Customer service is good, quick response
Difficult to use. connection is too tight and you need two hands to put it in it's place. Not user friendly while driving.

It does make my hair smooth and provides a soft supple bouncy quality to it. It’s relatively easy to use, I do suggest you practice at a time where you don’t have to be anywhere so you can see how it suits you best.

Cardboard is very thin cheap. Will ship my skis a week from now. I taped the box up at the seams and every foot around. Hope the box does not break during shipping. You get what you pay for. The boxes had some small holes in them during shipping. That is how cheap they are.

Overall they’re good headphones, easy to set up and just work. There comfortable but big and after a while they do start bothering your ears. The sound is good and controlling volume is conveniently located on one side of the earphones. The headphones have to be placed back in the charging stand a certain way to charge. After you figure out the best way it’s easy. They did interfere with the Apple TV and it’s WiFi connection. Once I figured it out just moved the devices farther apart and problem solved.
This soap is repulsive. All three bars arrived with mode on them. I threw them out immediately. The current price of $14.99 for 3 bars of moldy soap is a travesty.
Only gave this two stars cause it Dosent stay connected to the PS3 if you unplug the cord
This was a gift and before my son could play it required three updates. I was no happy his gift didn't work right out of the package
An overall good app with minor issues here and there. Not perfect but works well. So it gets a 4 of 5.

They are ok I guess but honestly I don't use them. I tried them a couple of times and they've been sitting in the case ever since. I got these for presicion work but haven't been able to get excited about them. They seem too hard actually especially when using them with regular prismas it easily indents the paper. And the colors are limited so it hinders their usefulness. I gave three stars because I don't think the pencils are flawed just not impressed with colors or application.
This is the easiest eyeliner to apply and it stays on all day. I'll be buying more!

One of the TVs in a back bedroom always has difficulty streaming videos because the wireless signal is too weak. We installed this in the hallway near the bedroom and have not had any problems since. We had no issues at all with the setup.

I think this might be my favorite self tanner I've ever used! It's the kind of tanner where you have to put it on at night and you'll see the difference the next morning. The lotion is white and has a great scent (even afterwards). I only had to use it for 2 nights to get the shade I wanted and it looked very natural. I love this brand and this tanner is my go-to now for sure.
Hard to put in takes up room doesn’t stand when you put the phone not practice at all
I had bought this once before, and it was very sparkly, now it barely has any glitter on the top piece, it makes no sense, you may as well buy a regular clear one. Disappointed

The story was garbage. Just a cash grab from the hype from Until Dawn, more wokeness and less creative story telling.

Bought this for my girlfriend. It did not work with her case at all, and the case is relatively thin. Even before she attempted to put the case on, the screen bubbled up at the top. We tried both, very carefully, with the same result. I am surprised to read that this product worked out for anyone else.
Hurts my ears. I use it as briefly as possible when Skyping. I thought I might use it for movie watching but just was to cumbersome and hurt.

This alarm clock is great! It has a nice look and nice sound. You need to use the app to control settings through your phone. This was a bit of a bummer as you can’t do this with the actual buttons on the clock. Once you get used to this piece, it’s really great. It’s so nice to have a phone charger and alarm clock in 1 device!
No cell signal whatsoever
It was priced right and downloaded and installed very easily.

The pillow on my old lap desk ripped, and I wanted a replacement, but I wanted to move away from the pillow. So, after a bit of searching, I found this one and felt it'd be a nice investment. Boy, was I wrong. It falls apart and won't stay together. It's made of solid pine (not necessarily a bad thing) but the workmanship is awful. I might be able to make it serviceable with a drill and some screws... Ultimately, I wouldn't waste your money or time with this item.
Works ok just not good on 2.0 internet

It's ok I guess but the only thing that gets me is you can't walk 2 ft away from your system without it disconnecting I can't tell you how many times I was in chat and got up to go to the bathroom which is in my room and I started to get static. Everything else is fine its comfortable for me and the sound isn't that bad wish it had just a little more bass but that's ok I like to get crazy when it comes to that.
my friend absolutely loved this

I’m not into frosted nail polish, but I was courious about Paris & Vine from the reviews here.
The polish goes on smooth, but to my eye this was Silver and Not a rose gold color that I was expecting.
I usually wear Opi polish, and the paris & vine polish seemed to dry as fast as Opi.
Over this color I use Opi RapiDry, and it went on fine and dryed fast.

The large square black lid top was too big and would not open this polish , it just kept spining around, and came right off to expose
A little lid cover that I had to open this with!

very easy to set up. came in packaged very nicely. the light has 3 different kinds. see photos. IT IS AMAZING! It is very flexible. My daughter can use this for her videos as well and she does slime videos. well worth the price! it has a rechargeable bluetooth remote as well. how awesome is that!
I used the program for a while. However, its too limited and exporting the data is a pain. When I had to replace my Kindle Fire HD I just didn't re-install it. I wasn't impressed enough with it.

Although this phone might do well in protecting your case, it does not a good job when it comes to wireless charging. Although it does wireless charge, the time it takes to charge the phone is significantly longer, almost 2 hours plus with the case on, compared to an hour and change with the back of the case off. As it is a hassle to take the case off every time I wanted to wireless charge my pixel 3 I just can't give it a great review. If you're not worried about wireless charging then this case is okay, but when if you are concerned about it, I would not get this case.
Great product...great value!

Case was much higher quality than I was expecting. Looks very impressive and the stand works well. Love the magnetic closure. One star off because, it seems impossible to keep from brushing against different controls on the tablet when using the case. I kept the case for special occasions when I want to have a really nice looking case
Fun game to play when your bored .
Don't buy this game its to slow and I deleted it right when I got it! There are other games out there that is better.

I’m just not thrilled with this one. The shade is off for me. The coverage is medium at best. By the end of the day it was all separated and just looked awful. The Kokie full coverage foundation is amazing much better. I hate that it’s limited edition. I went to rite aid a few days after using the full coverage foundation bought 2 extras since it is limited edition I do not want to be without that product. They still have a few shades on their wed site available.

I’d totally skip this one and check out their full coverage foundation.

These are nice and thick cables. But:
. the length is shorter than advertised,
. the terminal rings are a tad, like a mm, smaller than 5/16,
. and the insulation isn't an insulation tubed heated and shrunk snugly, it's just a slightly larger strip of plastics, like stripped from the heads of an awg2 cable sold for the same purpose.

This phone case is nice and thin. It also feels like it will protect my phone well. But the ‘ring’ to hold it is pretty flimsy where it connect. My husband has used his case for not even 2 weeks and the ring has broke off... so that defeats the purpose of buying a case with a build in ring.

My hair and this conditioner are not compatible. My hair looked and felt dried out after I used this conditioner...like straw. My natural waves weren't very wavy as well. It does have a nice scent. I've already given it to my mother, hopefully she will have better results than I.
Very stiff, but gets the job done and seems like it will last
It was just right for my games and items
Nothing my kids like more than chrome stuff, so when their new XBOX controller came in chrome...it was quite a party!

This fan has the same model number as the stock Asus Dual GTX 1070, but it DOES NOT FIT. This fan is very slightly larger: just enough so that it will not fit in the white fan enclosure.

FYI, the stock part I removed has a stamp 'B DEC 07 2016' and this listing is stamped 'MAR 12 2014'. Every other part of the back label is the same.
These worked for a small amount(maybe 20 pages) of printing and then gave an incompatible print cartridge message. I would not recommend them.
I really like these pens because they're multi-colored and eraseable. However, because they're eraseable, my notes typically hasn't lasted longer than 2 weeks in a five a subject notebook (thus far).
